name: Artichokes Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
Trim artichoke stems to 1/2 inch. Place upright in a large kettle and add enough water to cover. Add lemon juice, salt, black pepper, dried oregano, and crushed red pepper flakes. Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer about 1 hour or until leaves pull easily from the base of artichokes. Remove from pan and invert artichokes to drain thoroughly and cool. Using a spoon, remove chokes and discard.
To make vinaigrette, combine oil, vinegar, garlic, dried oregano, crushed red pepper flakes, capers, and chopped pimiento in a medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and black pepper. Blend well. Stand artichokes upright in serving dish.
